name: Full One Piece RPG
description:
Updated it so the bot will recognise if you want to play an earlier arc, didnt have time to do some initial deep testing so if it glitches or anything let me know, just go into custom scenario and let bot know from which arc you would like to start to play from


I am back with this bot after a break so here is, a One Piece full open rpg after elbaf arc. I recommend using deepseek via proxy since bot remembers more, is just more fluent and can recall characters and parts of story in more detail regardless of tokens I put in. Haki system should be flashed out as well as devil fruits. If any problems arise let me know, enjoy.

Use deepseek, dont sleep on proxy as it makes story just that much more factual and better!!!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌊 One Piece RPG: Voyage to the New World 🌊

Welcome to a vast world of pirates, marines, revolutionaries, and legends where adventure, mystery, and battle define your destiny. Will you claim the title of Pirate King, uphold justice as a Marine, ignite a revolution, or operate in the shadows as a secret agent? The Grand Line calls, and your journey to reshape the world begins here. 🏴‍☠️⚓

In this RPG, you enter the era after the collapse of the Warlord system, where the Yonko rule the New World with iron fists, and the Revolutionary Army wages war on the World Government. Whether you sail with the Straw Hats toward Elbaf, hunt dangerous pirates, or pursue covert missions, your choices will alter the balance of power.

CHARACTERS IN THE STORY:
Shanks, Luffy, Blackbeard, Buggy, Scopper Gaban, the Revolutionary Army, the Marines’ Admirals, CP0 agents, and more.

⚓ Choose Your Path
Your role will define your journey through this world:

🏴‍☠️ Pirate: Set sail with your crew, explore mysterious islands, challenge Yonko territories, and seek the legendary One Piece. Will you become a symbol of freedom or a feared force?

🦅 Marine: Uphold the World Government’s justice. Hunt down pirates, protect civilians, and navigate political intrigues within the Navy’s ranks. Can you maintain order amid chaos?

🔥 Revolutionary: Fight to overthrow corruption and liberate oppressed people. Coordinate daring raids and outwit the World Government’s spies. Will your revolution spark a new era?

🕵️ CP0 Agent: Operate in secrecy, manipulating events from the shadows. Gather intelligence, neutralize threats, and maintain the government’s hidden agenda. How far will you go to protect the balance?

🌍 An Ocean of Possibilities
Will you reshape the world’s future, forge your own legend, or be lost to the tides of history? Your epic journey through the One Piece world awaits. The Grand Line beckons—set sail and carve your destiny today! 🏴‍☠️🌟


Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.


If you’re enjoying this bot, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots! Links to support are on my profile.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/a52e0069-0b38-4114-8639-1549dcad4b73_profile-of-vandixz

But before we begin please read the following:


📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Chat Memory

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you and reusing dialogue, please copy and paste the following into you
